analytics.title: Workspace performance
analytics.subtitle: Track delivery health and synced Meta provider insights by day and by channel.

provider_sync.queued_message: Provider refresh queued. Background workers will update Meta insights.

calendar.title: Weekly schedule and history
calendar.subtitle: See what is queued next, what has a locked schedule, and jump straight back into the publishing workspace.

media.title: Media Library
media.empty: No media yet. Upload your first image or video above.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Manage campaigns from one list. Create new campaigns here, then open each campaign to generate segments and create draft posts.
campaigns.empty: No campaigns yet. Create one first, then open it to generate segments and draft posts.

ideas.title: Ideas
ideas.subtitle: Capture ideas, move them across stages, and manage them inline.

errors.convert_failed: Could not convert idea to post.

inbox.title: Comment interactions
inbox.subtitle: Review synced comments from supported channels, move threads through triage, and reply from the same workspace.

empty.no_interactive_body: Connect a supported Meta Facebook Page or Instagram Business account to use Inbox interactions.

sync.queued: Inbox refresh queued. Background workers will pull new comments.

list.empty: No synced comment threads match this filter yet.

settings.title: Workspace settings
settings.subtitle: Manage appearance, connected channels, and the publishing setup your workspace uses day to day.

appearance.label: Appearance
appearance.theme_subtitle: Choose how the workspace should render for this browser.

oauth.waiting_callback: Waiting for OAuth callback and token exchange.
oauth.select_entities_hint: Only the {entities} you connect here will show up in Publish and Calendar.

empty_hint.instagram: Make sure the Instagram account is Professional and the app has the required Instagram scopes.
empty_hint.linkedin: Make sure the LinkedIn account has granted the required permissions.
empty_hint.tiktok: Make sure the TikTok account is added as a sandbox target user and granted the requested scopes.
empty_hint.pinterest: Make sure the Pinterest login has access to at least one board and granted boards:read.
empty_hint.facebook: Make sure the login you used has access to at least one Facebook Page.

connected_channels.title: Connected channels
connected_channels.subtitle: {active} / {total} channels active in this workspace
connected_channels.empty_body: Connect a channel, then choose the accounts you want available for publishing in this workspace.

queue.duplicate_error: Queue slots cannot share the same day and time.
queue.schedule_note: Queue uses these active day and time slots for auto-scheduling.
queue.empty_body: Add at least one active slot if you want this channel to use Queue.

provider_modal.title: Connect a New Channel
provider_modal.subtitle: Choose the network you want to connect to this workspace.

disconnect.confirm_body: This channel will be removed from your workspace. Any scheduled posts targeting it will not be published.

posts.title: Posts
posts.subtitle: Manage drafts, queue, and publishing across every connected channel.
posts.empty_body: Create a post or switch to another tab.
